ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing On Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Continued To Feb-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Charles Welsh and the Attorney Jack Bonanno to appear on February 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy C. Robles. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Further Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonnano for (administrator) Charles Welsh.

Mr. Bonnano reported that he filed a petition for status of administration this morning and has a hearing date of October 28, 2015 (endorsed filed copy provided to the court), that they need to file fiduciary returns, that it is a complicated estate, that he anticipates finishing by October 15, 2015, that the heirs will probably waive an accounting and that they have received distributions on non estate items and have paid expenses with that. The status of filing a petition for final distribution was taken off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
